text: Delivered pixel-perfect, production-ready UIs for over 10 e-commerce platforms, achieving 85+ Lighthouse scores
Migrated monorepo projects from Webpack to Vite, reducing compiling time from ~5 min to ~15 seconds
Built reusable component libraries in Storybook, reducing UI development time by 25%
Automated theme inheritance workflows using Node.js, saving 200+ hours per year
Spearheaded TypeScript adoption across two teams, reducing runtime errors by 30%
